summary: Redesigned admin UI: slim dark sidebar with core nav only (no user features like post-item), single focused dashboard with live auction overview (active/upcoming/awaiting payment/ended counts), live session list, KPIs, revenue chart, and grouped admin module cards. Added GET /api/admin/dashboard/auction-overview backend endpoint.
current_status: Admin panel is dashboard-centric with core operations only. Restart backend for auction-overview API. Admin at /admin/dashboard.
